title: bidens cernua var. careopsidis
intro: Bidens cernua var. careopsidis, also known as Bur Marigold, is a variety of the Bidens cernua plant, which belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Bidens cernua var. careopsidis include its potential to reduce fever, ease pain, and aid in wound healing, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and respiratory problems. Bidens cernua var. careopsidis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as salves and creams, to take advantage of its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
